messages.subject: Cap table — quick ask before Friday
messages.snippet: Hi Alex — could you send the updated cap table?
messages.body: Hi Alex — could you send the updated cap table reflecting the SAFE conversions before our call Friday?

messages.subject: Expansion proposal — questions on pricing
messages.snippet: Thanks for sending this over. Two questions on the enterprise tier…
messages.body: Thanks for sending this over. Two questions on the enterprise tier before our legal team reviews — can you confirm seat-based pricing scales for orgs >500?

messages.subject: Board deck — final draft attached
messages.snippet: Final draft of Tuesday's board deck.
messages.body: Final draft of Tuesday's board deck. I made the changes you suggested re burn rate framing. Please review by tomorrow.

messages.subject: Staff Eng candidate — offer ready for signature
messages.snippet: Candidate verbally accepted. Offer letter ready in DocuSign for your signature.
messages.body: Candidate verbally accepted. Offer letter ready in DocuSign for your signature. Need it today.

messages.subject: v2 launch date — need a decision this week
messages.body: We have three options on the table. I've summarized them in the linked doc with trade-offs. Need your call by Friday.

messages.subject: 12 PRs need your review across 4 repos
Incident #4882 resolved after 47m
messages.body: Auth service degradation. Root cause: rate-limiter misconfig. Postmortem due Friday.

messages.body: Founders sharing multiples and burn at Series B.
